code: import Placedata from"./Placedata";import"./PlaceStyle.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Places=()=>{return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"places",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Popular Deatinations"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Tours give you the opportunity to see a lot, within a time frame."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Placedata,{className:"first-place",heading:"Taal Volcano, Batangas",text:"Taal Volcano, located in Batangas, Philippines, is one of the country\u2019s most active and fascinating volcanoes. It sits on an island within Taal Lake, forming a unique \u201Cvolcano within a lake within a volcano\u201D landscape. Despite its relatively small size, Taal has produced some of the most powerful eruptions in Philippine history, including the devastating events of 1754 and 2020. Its activity is closely monitored by PHIVOLCS due to the frequent volcanic unrest and hazards like ashfall, pyroclastic flows, and volcanic gas emissions. Today, Taal remains both a natural wonder and a reminder of the powerful geological forces shaping the Philippines.",img1:"https://plus.unsplash.com/premium_photo-1719843013722-c2f4d69db940?ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxzZWFyY2h8NXx8dHJhdmVsfGVufDB8fDB8fHww&auto=format&fit=crop&q=60&w=600",img2:"https://plus.unsplash.com/premium_photo-1721353413070-bb55c58138fb?ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxzZWFyY2h8Njd8fHRyYXZlbHxlbnwwfHwwfHx8MA%3D%3D&auto=format&fit=crop&q=60&w=600"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Placedata,{className:"first-place-reverse",heading:"Mt.Daguldul, Batangas",text:"Mt. It\u2019s a popular hiking destination known for its lush forests, gentle trails, and stunning views of the sea and nearby mountains. The trek usually begins at Laiya Beach and passes through local villages and Naambon Falls before reaching the summit. With its mix of nature, adventure, and ocean scenery, Mt. Daguldul offers an enjoyable and refreshing escape for both beginner and seasoned hikers.
